race.comment: LOLLIES (1) was on a winning run of two races but last time out missed the frame when sixth over 1050m at Rockhampton. Drawn to enjoy a good run on the speed and will give a great sight. XUANFENG (2) was in the money two starts back at Burrandowan but couldn't back it up last time when eighth, beaten 4 lengths, at Rockhampton over 1050m. Beautifully placed and is sure to take plenty of stopping. MARELLITY (4) well in the market lately and has gone close without winning, including a last start fifth at Rockhampton. Blinkers added; should be competitive. LITTLE FREDDY (6) is usually thereabouts and looks one for the exotics players.
